narrative:
Amboy / Metamora (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,269 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
